name: Spinach and Ricotta Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 Bunch fresh spinach or 1 pkg. frozen, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a deep 10-inch quiche pan with your favorite rich tart pastry.
2. Wash spinach and cook for a few minutes. Squeeze out all water and chop (approximately 3/4 cup).
3. Combine ricotta cheese, nutmeg, and 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese in a bowl.
4. Spread the mixture over the bottom of the pastry shell.
5. Beat eggs lightly. Mix with cream and milk. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Pour the egg mixture over the Ricotta-spinach mixture.
7. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
8. Bake in a 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) oven for 30 minutes until puffed and set.
9. Let quiche rest 5 to 10 minutes before serving.
